ops.title: iOS ad-hoc archive signing workaround
ops.body: Development provisioning profiles require >=1 registered device; this team has none, so automatic archive signing fails in CI with 'Your team has no devices'. The TestFlight lane therefore ad-hoc signs the archive (CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY=-, AD_HOC_CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=YES on the xcodebuild archive command) and re-signs for distribution at export via cloud-managed certificates (signingStyle=automatic + teamID in ios/ExportOptions.plist). Do not 'simplify' by removing the ad-hoc flags or archiving unsigned — export transforms an EXISTING signature and rejects unsigned archives. Validated by codex + WWDC21 session 10204.
ops.when: before modifying iOS code signing or TestFlight CI workflow
